model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It adhered strictly to the content constraints, delivering exactly the requested sentence with the required paralinguistic emphasis on 'is'. In a task requiring specific text synthesis with feature control, adding text is a major failure. Therefore, Model 1 demonstrates superior control and adherence to instructions.
